title: Pancake Productions: Music Discs
description: A mod that adds new fan made music discs to Minecraft that can all be crafted.
body:
**THIS IS JUST A MOD FOR FUN**
This mod adds 9 Music Discs and a way to obtain all of them.

**NONE OF THE MUSIC OR DISC COVERS ARE MINE PLEASE SUPPORT THE ORIGINAL CREATORS IF THE CREATORS ASK FOR THE MOD TO BE TAKEN DOWN I WILL TAKE IT DOWN**
Links to the Original Creators Youtube channels

[The Bling-Bling Cheese](https://www.youtube.com/@thebling-blingcheese1691)
Their Music I used: Fort-stress, Birch Bop, Neon.

[toastdot](https://www.youtube.com/@toastdot)
Their Music I used: Weird Realm.

[Naps the Block Music](https://www.youtube.com/@napstheblockmusic5807)

Their Music I used: Tall.

[Thaetaa-Terraainn](https://www.youtube.com/@Thaetaa-Terraainn)

Their Music I used: Remnant, Lush.

[That Musical Sparrow](https://www.youtube.com/@thatmusicalsparrow263)

Their Music I used: Ice.

[ SpringOnee](https://www.youtube.com/@springonee6010)

Their Music I used: Null

More Discs will be added soon :)
